name: Honey Mustard Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Rinse chicken wings well, then drain on paper towels.
3. Season the wings with salt and pepper.
4. In a bowl, blend together honey, melted butter, and Dijon mustard.
5. Dip the wings in the marinade one at a time.
6. Place the dipped wings in a shallow baking pan.
7. Bake for 45 minutes, basting occasionally.
Preheat oven to 325°F. Rinse chicken wings well, drain on paper towels, and season with salt and pepper. Blend honey, melted butter, and Dijon mustard in a bowl. Dip the wings one at a time in the marinade, then place them in a shallow baking pan. Bake for 45 minutes, basting occasionally.
